description: Parse every supported file in a directory to text or JSON using the vendored batch_parse_dir.py wrapper (local, no network).
rules: read-only on inputs — parsed artifacts are written under record_store/parsed
FORMAT is 'text' or 'json'; output basenames mirror input basenames
EXTENSION filters to one type (e.g. '.pdf'); empty processes all supported types
RECURSIVE='1' recurses into subdirectories; a run summary is written under record_store
usage: Set INPUT_DIR, optional FORMAT (text|json), optional EXTENSION (e.g. .pdf), optional RECURSIVE (1). Output: batch.json summary + parsed/ artifacts.
limitation: Requires the liteparse package at runtime (the vendored script imports it); when absent the porter writes a graceful summary so the contract still holds. Office/image inputs need LibreOffice/ImageMagick.
